acceptance_targets: [ch16-craft-001] PASS if the revised span around snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_16.md:290-296 includes (1) one concrete family consequence Marisol cannot rhetorically control and (2) one self-implicating line before any abstract social claim; FAIL if the first substantive answer is still a polished generalization.

[ch16-prose-001] PASS if, in revised lines 3-39, no run exceeds six consecutive paragraphs without a clear Marisol interior marker (thought, sensation, memory, or self-assessment); FAIL if the opening still reads as uninterrupted external observation for 10+ paragraphs.

[ch16-dialogue-001] PASS if revised crowd lines present at least three clearly distinct idiolects that remain identifiable even without dialogue tags; FAIL if the lines can still be swapped between speakers with little tonal change.

[ch16-prose-002] PASS if the revised chapter uses explicit 'both ... true' style formulation no more than once and the remaining contradiction beats are shown through specific behavior or detail; FAIL if three explicit binary-reconciliation slogans remain.

[ch16-prose-003] PASS if revised lines around snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_16.md:105 describe the room's shift using at least two concrete sensory/physical cues and no film/drama meta-language; FAIL if the beat still relies on cinematic abstraction.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS if the revised span around snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_16.md:290-296 includes (1) one concrete family consequence Marisol cannot rhetorically control and (2) one self-implicating line before any abstract social claim; FAIL if the first substantive answer is still a polished generalization.
findings.problem: Sanitization drift via moral safety valve: immediately after the wake rupture, the narrative pivots into quote-ready abstraction ('I regret that truth always lands on women with mops and grocery lists') instead of staying with direct interpersonal damage. This defuses tension at the exact point consequence should feel least controllable.
findings.rewrite_direction: Revise the press-exchange beat at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_16.md:290 and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_16.md:294 so Marisol first names a concrete cost she caused (mother/sister/Leo consequence in-room) before any structural framing. Keep the interview pressure but remove the immediate polished thesis posture.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS if, in revised lines 3-39, no run exceeds six consecutive paragraphs without a clear Marisol interior marker (thought, sensation, memory, or self-assessment); FAIL if the opening still reads as uninterrupted external observation for 10+ paragraphs.
findings.problem: Interiority drought: the opening runs more than ten consecutive paragraphs of staging/dialogue before Marisol gets an internal beat, pushing the chapter toward external coverage instead of close-third lived pressure.
findings.rewrite_direction: Insert interior microbeats within snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_16.md:13, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_16.md:27, and/or snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_16.md:33-37 so Marisol's thought/sensation/self-assessment threads through the wake setup before the kitchen confrontation.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS if revised crowd lines present at least three clearly distinct idiolects that remain identifiable even without dialogue tags; FAIL if the lines can still be swapped between speakers with little tonal change.
findings.problem: Crowd dialogue is pressure-correct but voice-blurred: multiple speakers use similar sentence weight and argument vocabulary, so opposition factions become interchangeable rather than socially distinct.
findings.rewrite_direction: Rework the two crowd bursts at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_16.md:212-218 and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_16.md:254-260 with differentiated registers (church elder cadence, intern/legal language, neighborhood slang, code-switching) so each line carries identifiable social position and rhythm.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS if the revised chapter uses explicit 'both ... true' style formulation no more than once and the remaining contradiction beats are shown through specific behavior or detail; FAIL if three explicit binary-reconciliation slogans remain.
findings.problem: A recurring contradiction-slogan construction ('both things can be true' / 'those two things can live together' / 'both are true') appears three times and starts to feel programmatic instead of discovered in-scene.
findings.rewrite_direction: Keep the thematic contradiction once, but revise at least two of snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_16.md:95, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_16.md:318, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_16.md:356 into concrete action/image that enacts duality without stating the slogan directly.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS if revised lines around snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_16.md:105 describe the room's shift using at least two concrete sensory/physical cues and no film/drama meta-language; FAIL if the beat still relies on cinematic abstraction.
findings.problem: Generic cinematic phrasing ('Not in a dramatic movie way') undercuts the chapter's otherwise concrete diction and conflicts with the style profile's ban on cinematic-generic drift.
findings.rewrite_direction: Replace the abstraction at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_16.md:105 with concrete social mechanics already present in-scene (chair scrape stop, phone lift angles, breath/noise drop) so tension shift is rendered materially rather than meta-described.

non_negotiables: Maintain heading contract exactly (# Chapter N).
Elliptical clipping is not permitted in dialogue or narration.
Avoid transcript cadence in high-stakes dialogue.
Avoid stiff over-formality in dialogue; use contractions and colloquial rhythm where character-true.
Reduce procedural drift when it displaces embodied consequence.
Maintain character-specific voice signatures from style bible.
Honor aesthetic risk policy: sanitization is the primary craft risk — do not soften, euphemize, or retreat from the story's established register. When in doubt, err toward rawness.

aesthetic_risk_policy.creative_risk_policy: When choosing between reputationally safe abstraction and specific discomfort, choose specificity. Render addiction, sexuality, deceit, class shame, and grief at lived scale. In edge cases, preserve character truth and causal accountability over reader comfort or institutional decorum.
aesthetic_risk_policy.euphemism_penalty: If a scene demands bodily, moral, or economic specificity, euphemistic phrasing is treated as a failed draft and must be rewritten with concrete stakes and observable consequence.

dialogue_rules.default_contraction_use: high - contractions are the spoken default; full forms appear only for emphasis, ritual language, or character-specific formal posture

prose_style_profile.chapter_texture_variance: Alternate scene density and pressure modes: pair high-conflict chapters with quiet domestic or documentary chapters, vary dialogue-to-interiority ratios, and prevent identical chapter skeletons in consecutive sequence.
prose_style_profile.diction: contemporary literary diction with class-aware, borough-specific concreteness; avoid prestige-neutral workshop language
prose_style_profile.narrative_distance: close third centered on Marisol, with rare brief distance expansions for institutional scenes
prose_style_profile.rhythm_target: alternating tensile compression and reflective extension; line-level cadence should carry emotional pressure, not just information
